sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Exelixis (EXEL) director receives 8,367 RSUs vesting in 2027
feed.summary: Exelixis director Sue Gail Eckhardt was granted 8,367 restricted stock units (RSUs) on May 27, 2026, under the company's 2017 Equity Incentive Plan. These RSUs will fully vest on May 27, 2027, contingent on her continuous service. Following this grant, she now holds a total of 25,891 shares, including previously outstanding RSUs.

feed.title: Equillium (EQ) director Barbara Troupin receives grant of 70,000 stock options
feed.summary: Equillium, Inc. director Barbara Troupin was granted options to purchase 70,000 shares of common stock at an exercise price of $2.84 per share. These options will vest in twelve equal monthly installments beginning May 28, 2026, or earlier, upon the issuer's next annual stockholder meeting. Following this grant, Troupin directly holds 70,000 derivative securities.

feed.title: Director at Entravision (NYSE: EVC) receives 16,524 RSUs
feed.summary: Entravision Communications Corp. director Paul A. Zevnik was granted 16,524 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Class A common stock at no cost. These RSUs will vest fully by May 28, 2027, or the day before the company's 2027 annual stockholder meeting, with shares delivered upon his cessation of board service. Following this grant, Zevnik directly holds 222,672 restricted stock units and indirectly owns over 2.9 million Class A shares through trusts.

feed.title: Bermuda and Caribbean Cruise Loyalty Gets a Major Boost as Celebrity Cruises Expands Captain’s Club With Double Zenith and Triple Zenith Rewards
feed.summary: Celebrity Cruises has significantly expanded its Captain’s Club loyalty program, introducing new milestone benefits within existing tiers and two new elite levels: Double Zenith and Triple Zenith. These changes, effective June 11, 2026, aim to reward high-frequency cruisers with enhanced perks like premium WiFi, dining discounts, and even a complimentary seven-night Bermuda or Caribbean cruise in a Sky Suite for Triple Zenith members. The update, combined with Royal Caribbean Group's Points Choice program, offers more flexibility and stronger motivation for loyal guests to continue sailing with Celebrity Cruises.

feed.title: Best free tool deal: Shop Home Depot's Ryobi Days event to get free tools
feed.summary: Home Depot's Ryobi Days event offers a significant deal: customers can get a free Ryobi tool (valued up to $89) when they purchase the Ryobi One+ 18V Battery Starter Kit for $99, a savings of $129 off its original price of $228. This promotion, perfect for home improvement season, allows buyers to choose one free tool from a selection of 13 Ryobi items, including blowers or jobsite fans. The article highlights the value of this "buy one get one" style deal, especially for those looking to expand their tool collection.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin to Acquire CIRCOR Aerospace Business for $2.55 Billion
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin has agreed to acquire CIRCOR International's Commercial and Defense Aerospace business for $2.55 billion. This acquisition is set to strengthen Parker's presence in the aerospace and defense sector by adding advanced motion and flow control technologies for mission-critical aircraft applications. The deal, expected to close in the second half of 2026, will expand Parker's product portfolio and enhance its relationships with customers globally.
